title: Ethereum Foundation Co-Exec Director and Board Member Hsiao-Wei Wang Steps Down
summary: Hsiao-Wei Wang, co-executive director and board member of the Ethereum Foundation, has resigned. This follows other recent high-profile departures, including former co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and several Protocol cluster leads, raising questions about the organization's future direction.
body:
Hsiao-Wei Wang, co-executive director and board member of the Ethereum Foundation, has stepped down. Wang's departure comes on the heels of other significant leadership changes, including the resignation of former co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and several Protocol cluster leads.

Wang has been a pivotal figure in Ethereum's development, overseeing critical initiatives and governance. The Ethereum Foundation has not yet announced a replacement, leaving a leadership vacuum at a crucial time for the network.

These departures could impact Ethereum's strategic direction and community engagement. The Foundation plays a vital role in funding and supporting Ethereum's ecosystem, and leadership changes can influence project priorities and development timelines.

For Ethereum users and developers, this news highlights the importance of staying informed about the Foundation's next steps. Watch for announcements regarding new leadership appointments and any shifts in Ethereum's roadmap or funding priorities.
twitterThread: Hsiao-Wei Wang, co-executive director and board member of the Ethereum Foundation, has stepped down. This follows other high-profile exits, including former co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and several Protocol cluster leads, raising questions about the org's future.
Wang's departure, along with ex-co-exec director Tomasz Stańczak and Protocol cluster leads, leaves a leadership gap. The Foundation hasn't named replacements yet.

For Ethereum users, watch for new leadership announcements and any shifts in project priorities. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-18-ethereum-foundation-co-exec-director-and-board-member-steps-down
